name: devbridge
description: Bidirectional bridge between VS Code AI assistants and your phone.

chatParticipants.name: devbridge
chatParticipants.description: DevBridge relay — mirrors this chat to your phone

devbridge.connectionMode.description: How the extension connects to the DevBridge Agent. Use 'unix' for local/Docker, 'tcp' for remote or WSL.

devbridge.agentSocketPath.description: [unix mode] Path to the DevBridge Agent Unix socket.

devbridge.agentHost.description: [tcp mode] Hostname or IP address of the DevBridge Agent.

devbridge.agentPort.description: [tcp mode] TCP port the DevBridge Agent listens on for IPC.

devbridge.questionConfidenceThreshold.description: Number of question patterns that must match before sending a push notification.

devbridge.terminalSendMode.markdownDescription: How DevBridge sends text to VS Code terminals. `paste` uses a single `sendText(text, true)`. `split` sends the text first, then a separate Enter keypress. `split` is more reliable for TUIs like Codex.
